channel.title: Smith Daily Digest
channel.description: Personalized daily tech & finance audio digest
channel.itunes:author: Audio Digest Bot

item.title: Daily Digest — July 13, 2026
item.description:
Daily Digest — July 13, 2026
Episode: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/daily_show_2026-07-13.mp3 Transcript / show notes: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/transcript_2026-07-13.txt
Chapters: 1:04 — Apple Just Filed the Lawsuit That Could Destroy OpenAI 4:08 — Why Everyone Is Drowning In Debt (and how to get out) - Caleb Hammer - #1123 7:03 — How to Improve Your Memory & Cognitive Function at Any Age | Dr. Alan Castel 9:13 — Jocko Underground: Is It Possible to Get The Actual Truth From Modern Media?
Sources: - Apple Just Filed the Lawsuit That Could Destroy OpenAI (Tom Bilyeu's Impact Theory) Source audio: https://pscrb.fm/rss/p/pdrl.fm/02d1c6/tracking.swap.fm/track/2TbQRMLORjx6LKLZ4L5i/mgln.ai/e/1047/pfx.veritonicmetrics.com/quj9/s.gum.fm/s-5e30860bfeb6de005a728351/rss.art19.com/episodes/ef3c921c-6a03-490b-94d1-8253cebaade8.mp3?rss_browser=BAhJIhNQb2RjYXN0TW9uaXRvcgY6BkVU--2525c10adc632ac8804d73af95f80c3dcc556542 - Why Everyone Is Drowning In Debt (and how to get out) - Caleb Hammer - #1123 (Modern Wisdom) Source audio: https://prfx.byspotify.com/e/pscrb.fm/rss/p/claritaspod.com/measure/traffic.megaphone.fm/SIXMSB8612035080.mp3 - How to Improve Your Memory & Cognitive Function at Any Age | Dr. Alan Castel (Huberman Lab) Link: https://www.hubermanlab.com/episode/how-to-improve-your-memory-and-cognitive-function-at-any-age-alan-castel Source audio: https://traffic.megaphone.fm/SCIM5781519002.mp3 - Jocko Underground: Is It Possible to Get The Actual Truth From Modern Media? (Jocko Podcast) Link: http://jockopodcast.com Source audio: https://audio3.redcircle.com/episodes/1d7dd9c3-c968-460f-9f70-bde877378620/stream.mp3

item.title: Daily Digest — July 12, 2026
item.description:
Daily Digest — July 12, 2026
Episode: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/daily_show_2026-07-12.mp3 Transcript / show notes: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/transcript_2026-07-12.txt
Chapters: 1:04 — Jim Paulsen Sees a Correction Coming | The 33 Charts That Turned Him Cautious 4:19 — Seven allegedly fake Chanel bags vs The RealReal 7:11 — Is California's $750 Million Bet on Hollywood Working?
Sources: - Jim Paulsen Sees a Correction Coming | The 33 Charts That Turned Him Cautious (Excess Returns) Link: https://podcasters.spotify.com/pod/show/excess-returns/episodes/Jim-Paulsen-Sees-a-Correction-Coming--The-33-Charts-That-Turned-Him-Cautious-e3luo8e Source audio: https://anchor.fm/s/9a1dfac/podcast/play/122691278/https%3A%2F%2Fd3ctxlq1ktw2nl.cloudfront.net%2Fstaging%2F2026-6-11%2F427766432-44100-2-d44d96b265539.mp3 - Seven allegedly fake Chanel bags vs The RealReal (Planet Money) Link: https://www.npr.org/2026/07/10/nx-s1-5879253/chanel-realreal-secondhand-luxury-market Source audio: https://tracking.swap.fm/track/XvDEoI11TR00olTUO8US/prfx.byspotify.com/e/play.podtrac.com/npr-510289/npr.simplecastaudio.com/43b5acee-463e-4612-95ad-d2596d9dd337/episodes/a5a22e7a-4cac-46c1-b29b-d5dbebba9027/audio/128/default.mp3?awCollectionId=43b5acee-463e-4612-95ad-d2596d9dd337&awEpisodeId=a5a22e7a-4cac-46c1-b29b-d5dbebba9027&feed=hvWWWzRv&t=podcast&e=nx-s1-5879253&p=510289&d=1538&size=24619555 - Is California's $750 Million Bet on Hollywood Working? (The Town with Matthew Belloni) Source audio: https://traffic.megaphone.fm/GLT1223587358.mp3

item.title: Daily Digest — July 11, 2026
item.description:
Daily Digest — July 11, 2026
Episode: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/daily_show_2026-07-11.mp3 Transcript / show notes: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/transcript_2026-07-11.txt
Chapters: 1:02 — More Trillion Dollar IPOs, Anthropic $3T, Zuck's Price War, China Ends Open Sour 2:54 — More Trillion Dollar IPOs, Anthropic $3T, Zuck's Price War, China Ends Open Sour 6:04 — Pioneers of AI: John Deere's AI vision for future farms 8:18 — Is AI The Next Stage Of Human Evolution? - Robert Wright - #1122 11:06 — Is AI The Next Stage Of Human Evolution? - Robert Wright - #1122
Sources: - More Trillion Dollar IPOs, Anthropic $3T, Zuck's Price War, China Ends Open Source?, Trump Accounts (All-In with Chamath, Jason, Sacks & Friedberg) Link: https://allinchamathjason.libsyn.com/more-trillion-dollar-ipos-anthropic-3t-zucks-price-war-china-ends-open-source-trump-accounts Source audio: https://dts.podtrac.com/redirect.mp3/traffic.libsyn.com/secure/allinchamathjason/ALLIN-E280_Ch.mp3?dest-id=1928300 - Pioneers of AI: John Deere's AI vision for future farms (Masters of Scale) Source audio: https://dts.podtrac.com/redirect.mp3/prfx.byspotify.com/e/pscrb.fm/rss/p/tracking.swap.fm/track/7G0M4p2bOLP0mP50O3CD/rss.art19.com/episodes/ee8d34db-4935-462b-a17d-0c5ad7284170.mp3?rss_browser=BAhJIhNQb2RjYXN0TW9uaXRvcgY6BkVU--2525c10adc632ac8804d73af95f80c3dcc556542 - Is AI The Next Stage Of Human Evolution? - Robert Wright - #1122 (Modern Wisdom) Source audio: https://prfx.byspotify.com/e/pscrb.fm/rss/p/claritaspod.com/measure/traffic.megaphone.fm/SIXMSB4124462792.mp3

item.title: Daily Digest — July 10, 2026
item.description:
Daily Digest — July 10, 2026
Episode: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/daily_show_2026-07-10.mp3 Transcript / show notes: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/transcript_2026-07-10.txt
Chapters: 1:06 — Open Source Wins, AGI Is Here, and Scorsese's AI Toolkit with CEOs of Cerebras & 4:03 — The Korean Levered ETFs Shaking Markets All Around the World 6:16 — How Bitcoin Rewired a Classic Computer Science Problem
Sources: - Open Source Wins, AGI Is Here, and Scorsese's AI Toolkit with CEOs of Cerebras & Black Forest Labs (All-In with Chamath, Jason, Sacks & Friedberg) Link: https://allinchamathjason.libsyn.com/open-source-wins-agi-is-here-and-scorseses-ai-toolkit-with-ceos-of-cerebras-black-forest-labs Source audio: https://dts.podtrac.com/redirect.mp3/traffic.libsyn.com/secure/allinchamathjason/PARIS_Versailles_Ch4.mp3?dest-id=1928300 - The Korean Levered ETFs Shaking Markets All Around the World (Odd Lots) Link: https://omny.fm/shows/odd-lots/the-korean-levered-etfs-shaking-markets-all-around-the-world Source audio: https://podtrac.com/pts/redirect.mp3/tracking.swap.fm/track/UVBrz8bN8aM2Xe47PEPu/traffic.omny.fm/d/clips/e73c998e-6e60-432f-8610-ae210140c5b1/8a94442e-5a74-4fa2-8b8d-ae27003a8d6b/59c7d65a-dfbb-447c-8ed4-b482014569c9/audio.mp3?utm_source=Podcast&in_playlist=982f5071-765c-403d-969d-ae27003a8d83 - How Bitcoin Rewired a Classic Computer Science Problem (a16z Podcast) Link: https://a16z.simplecast.com/episodes/how-bitcoin-rewired-a-classic-computer-science-problem-0_lm073b Source audio: https://mgln.ai/e/1344/afp-848985-injected.calisto.simplecastaudio.com/3f86df7b-51c6-4101-88a2-550dba782de8/episodes/137beb9b-798a-40a2-a14f-cb3043ce5521/audio/128/default.mp3?aid=rss_feed&awCollectionId=3f86df7b-51c6-4101-88a2-550dba782de8&awEpisodeId=137beb9b-798a-40a2-a14f-cb3043ce5521&feed=JGE3yC0V

item.title: Daily Digest — July 09, 2026
item.description:
Daily Digest — July 09, 2026
Episode: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/daily_show_2026-07-09.mp3 Transcript / show notes: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/transcript_2026-07-09.txt
Chapters: 1:12 — One of the World's Largest Hedge Funds on Its 86x Growth in Token Spending 3:37 — YouTube economics now, with Justin Kuiper 6:00 — ENCORE: Bitcoin is Changing the Fight for Freedom
Sources: - One of the World's Largest Hedge Funds on Its 86x Growth in Token Spending (Odd Lots) Link: https://omny.fm/shows/odd-lots/one-of-the-worlds-largest-hedge-funds-on-its-86x-growth-in-token-spending Source audio: https://podtrac.com/pts/redirect.mp3/tracking.swap.fm/track/UVBrz8bN8aM2Xe47PEPu/traffic.omny.fm/d/clips/e73c998e-6e60-432f-8610-ae210140c5b1/8a94442e-5a74-4fa2-8b8d-ae27003a8d6b/ee665e22-5abb-4981-a58d-b481016ff97e/audio.mp3?utm_source=Podcast&in_playlist=982f5071-765c-403d-969d-ae27003a8d83 - YouTube economics now, with Justin Kuiper (Complex Systems with Patrick McKenzie (patio11)) Link: https://www.complexsystemspodcast.com/justin-kuiper-youtube/ Source audio: https://pscrb.fm/rss/p/prfx.byspotify.com/e/media.transistor.fm/21891487/01365b2c.mp3 - ENCORE: Bitcoin is Changing the Fight for Freedom (Politicology) Source audio: https://www.podtrac.com/pts/redirect.mp3/traffic.megaphone.fm/TSK2569864157.mp3

item.title: Daily Digest — July 08, 2026
item.description:
Daily Digest — July 08, 2026
Episode: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/daily_show_2026-07-08.mp3 Transcript / show notes: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/transcript_2026-07-08.txt
Chapters: 1:12 — The $600 Billion Loop | Jeff Klingelhofer on AI, the Return of Bonds and the Fed 3:08 — #484 — Artificial Intimacy 6:13 — We Asked a $1 Billion Quant Manager Why Concentration Isn't a Warning — and Smal
Sources: - The $600 Billion Loop | Jeff Klingelhofer on AI, the Return of Bonds and the Fed's Third Mandate (Excess Returns) Link: https://podcasters.spotify.com/pod/show/excess-returns/episodes/The-600-Billion-Loop--Jeff-Klingelhofer-on-AI--the-Return-of-Bonds-and-the-Feds-Third-Mandate-e3lo1m3 Source audio: https://traffic.megaphone.fm/APO1085977372.mp3 - #484 — Artificial Intimacy (Making Sense with Sam Harris) Link: https://wakingup.libsyn.com/484-artificial-intimacy Source audio: https://traffic.libsyn.com/secure/wakingup/484_MS_Paul_Bloom_paywall.mp3?dest-id=480596 - We Asked a $1 Billion Quant Manager Why Concentration Isn't a Warning — and Small Caps Aren't Dead (Excess Returns) Link: https://podcasters.spotify.com/pod/show/excess-returns/episodes/We-Asked-a-1-Billion-Quant-Manager-Why-Concentration-Isnt-a-Warning--and-Small-Caps-Arent-Dead-e3lpm8a Source audio: https://traffic.megaphone.fm/APO2696800456.mp3

item.title: Daily Digest — July 07, 2026
item.description:
Daily Digest — July 07, 2026
Episode: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/daily_show_2026-07-07.mp3 Transcript / show notes: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/transcript_2026-07-07.txt
Chapters: 0:58 — Is Software Losing Its Head? 4:02 — Is Software Losing Its Head? 6:50 — Jeremy Giffon - The Billion Dollar PDF - [Invest Like the Best, EP.481] 8:57 — China Is Running The Same Play That Wiped Out The First Wave Of Internet Investo
Sources: - Is Software Losing Its Head? (a16z Podcast) Link: https://a16z.simplecast.com/episodes/is-software-losing-its-head-uKBsa_UH Source audio: https://mgln.ai/e/1344/afp-848985-injected.calisto.simplecastaudio.com/3f86df7b-51c6-4101-88a2-550dba782de8/episodes/fc912d16-715f-4956-bf42-2d0389333812/audio/128/default.mp3?aid=rss_feed&awCollectionId=3f86df7b-51c6-4101-88a2-550dba782de8&awEpisodeId=fc912d16-715f-4956-bf42-2d0389333812&feed=JGE3yC0V - Jeremy Giffon - The Billion Dollar PDF - [Invest Like the Best, EP.481] (Invest Like the Best with Patrick O'Shaughnessy) Link: https://colossus.com/episode/posting-priests-private-markets/ Source audio: https://traffic.megaphone.fm/CLS7913917793.mp3 - China Is Running The Same Play That Wiped Out The First Wave Of Internet Investors (Tom Bilyeu's Impact Theory) Source audio: https://pscrb.fm/rss/p/pdrl.fm/02d1c6/tracking.swap.fm/track/2TbQRMLORjx6LKLZ4L5i/mgln.ai/e/1047/pfx.veritonicmetrics.com/quj9/s.gum.fm/s-5e30860bfeb6de005a728351/rss.art19.com/episodes/1946c575-482b-409e-84f0-8815bd996d42.mp3?rss_browser=BAhJIhNQb2RjYXN0TW9uaXRvcgY6BkVU--2525c10adc632ac8804d73af95f80c3dcc556542

item.title: Daily Digest — July 05, 2026
item.description:
Daily Digest — July 05, 2026
Episode: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/daily_show_2026-07-05.mp3 Transcript / show notes: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/transcript_2026-07-05.txt
Chapters: 1:03 — Labor Market Cracks, Wild Fed Credibility Data and Semis Running Out of Pie | La 6:24 — Reclaim Kids from Tech with Dr. Lisa Strohman - Episode 2822 9:01 — Are Fitness Trackers Worth It? - Eric Helms & Steve Hall 11:26 — #381 "Don't Open a Jiu Jitsu School Feat. Jared Weiner, Kyle Watson, Nick Sander
Sources: - Labor Market Cracks, Wild Fed Credibility Data and Semis Running Out of Pie | Last Call (Excess Returns) Link: https://podcasters.spotify.com/pod/show/excess-returns/episodes/Labor-Market-Cracks--Wild-Fed-Credibility-Data-and-Semis-Running-Out-of-Pie--Last-Call-e3lk9vh Source audio: https://traffic.megaphone.fm/APO2803240124.mp3 - Reclaim Kids from Tech with Dr. Lisa Strohman - Episode 2822 (Fitness Confidential) Link: https://angriesttrainer.libsyn.com/reclaim-kids-from-tech-with-dr-lisa-strohman-episode-2822 Source audio: https://dts.podtrac.com/redirect.mp3/traffic.libsyn.com/secure/angriesttrainer/1on1DrLisaStrohman-070326-WVF1To.mp3?dest-id=117301 - Are Fitness Trackers Worth It? - Eric Helms & Steve Hall (The Revive Stronger Podcast) Source audio: https://pdst.fm/e/traffic.megaphone.fm/RSL9320624366.mp3 - #381 "Don't Open a Jiu Jitsu School Feat. item.description:
Daily Digest — July 04, 2026
Episode: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/daily_show_2026-07-04.mp3 Transcript / show notes: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/transcript_2026-07-04.txt
Chapters: 1:10 — AI Sovereignty Wars, Palantir-Nvidia Deal, SCOTUS Birthright Ruling, Newsom's CA 4:22 — Venture Capital During the AI Revolution with Mamoon Hamid 6:47 — How a Major Grocery Store Chain Can Dramatically Lower the Cost of Food
Sources: - AI Sovereignty Wars, Palantir-Nvidia Deal, SCOTUS Birthright Ruling, Newsom's CA Budget Lie (All-In with Chamath, Jason, Sacks & Friedberg) Link: https://allinchamathjason.libsyn.com/ai-sovereignty-wars-palantir-nvidia-deal-scotus-birthright-ruling-newsoms-ca-budget-lie Source audio: https://dts.podtrac.com/redirect.mp3/traffic.libsyn.com/secure/allinchamathjason/ALLIN-E279_Ch.mp3?dest-id=1928300 - Venture Capital During the AI Revolution with Mamoon Hamid (Masters in Business) Link: https://omny.fm/shows/masters-in-business/venture-capital-during-the-ai-revolution-with-mamoon-hamid Source audio: https://podtrac.com/pts/redirect.mp3/traffic.omny.fm/d/clips/e73c998e-6e60-432f-8610-ae210140c5b1/4e4cd910-40a1-4619-a5f3-ae2b0012ffff/9b9bd516-49a3-47f7-8ae9-b47b0113c7a7/audio.mp3?utm_source=Podcast&in_playlist=5873a3cb-298f-40bc-b71f-ae2b0013000d - How a Major Grocery Store Chain Can Dramatically Lower the Cost of Food (Odd Lots) Link: https://omny.fm/shows/odd-lots/how-a-major-grocery-store-chain-can-dramatically-lower-the-cost-of-food Source audio: https://podtrac.com/pts/redirect.mp3/tracking.swap.fm/track/UVBrz8bN8aM2Xe47PEPu/traffic.omny.fm/d/clips/e73c998e-6e60-432f-8610-ae210140c5b1/8a94442e-5a74-4fa2-8b8d-ae27003a8d6b/8e5cf07d-8bf4-43a2-9703-b47b014a5166/audio.mp3?utm_source=Podcast&in_playlist=982f5071-765c-403d-969d-ae27003a8d83

item.title: Daily Digest — July 01, 2026
item.description:
Daily Digest — July 01, 2026
Episode: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/daily_show_2026-07-01.mp3 Transcript / show notes: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/transcript_2026-07-01.txt
Chapters: 0:31 — He Wrote the Book on Why Moats Fail | Ritavan on What Actually Compounds Instead 3:01 — He Wrote the Book on Why Moats Fail | Ritavan on What Actually Compounds Instead 5:31 — #483 — The Knots We Tie Ourselves Into 8:03 — Supreme Court Rulings, Birthright Citizenship, and the Impact of AI on America’s
Sources: - He Wrote the Book on Why Moats Fail | Ritavan on What Actually Compounds Instead (Excess Returns) Link: https://podcasters.spotify.com/pod/show/excess-returns/episodes/He-Wrote-the-Book-on-Why-Moats-Fail--Ritavan-on-What-Actually-Compounds-Instead-e3lgvh0 Source audio: https://traffic.megaphone.fm/APO4213914554.mp3 - #483 — The Knots We Tie Ourselves Into (Making Sense with Sam Harris) Link: https://wakingup.libsyn.com/483-the-knots-we-tie-ourselves-into Source audio: https://traffic.libsyn.com/secure/wakingup/482_MS_Alain_deBotton_paywall.mp3?dest-id=480596 - Supreme Court Rulings, Birthright Citizenship, and the Impact of AI on America’s Future (Tom Bilyeu's Impact Theory) Source audio: https://pscrb.fm/rss/p/pdrl.fm/02d1c6/tracking.swap.fm/track/2TbQRMLORjx6LKLZ4L5i/mgln.ai/e/1047/pfx.veritonicmetrics.com/quj9/s.gum.fm/s-5e30860bfeb6de005a728351/rss.art19.com/episodes/db35f243-aaf4-4a44-8698-0ccc8c2f49b2.mp3?rss_browser=BAhJIhNQb2RjYXN0TW9uaXRvcgY6BkVU--2525c10adc632ac8804d73af95f80c3dcc556542

item.title: Daily Digest — June 30, 2026
item.description:
Daily Digest — June 30, 2026
Episode: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/daily_show_2026-06-30.mp3 Transcript / show notes: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/transcript_2026-06-30.txt
Chapters: 0:01 — Etched - Building AI Hardware to Make Inference Faster and Cheaper - [Invest Lik 2:06 — Grant Sanderson – AI and the future of math 3:35 — The Fed Just Changed How They Measure Inflation — Right Before The Election. Not 7:19 — The Fed Just Changed How They Measure Inflation — Right Before The Election. Not
Sources: - Etched - Building AI Hardware to Make Inference Faster and Cheaper - [Invest Like the Best, EP.480] (Invest Like the Best with Patrick O'Shaughnessy) Link: https://colossus.com/episode/the-future-of-ai-hardware/ Source audio: https://traffic.megaphone.fm/CLS8561569864.mp3 - Grant Sanderson – AI and the future of math (Dwarkesh Podcast) Link: https://www.dwarkesh.com/p/grant-sanderson-2 Source audio: https://api.substack.com/feed/podcast/204275916/5f3632cca68272c292349f10debc3573.mp3 - The Fed Just Changed How They Measure Inflation — Right Before The Election. Not A Coincidence (Tom Bilyeu's Impact Theory) Source audio: https://pscrb.fm/rss/p/pdrl.fm/02d1c6/tracking.swap.fm/track/2TbQRMLORjx6LKLZ4L5i/mgln.ai/e/1047/pfx.veritonicmetrics.com/quj9/s.gum.fm/s-5e30860bfeb6de005a728351/rss.art19.com/episodes/6d9a51ac-ddae-4988-aa8e-8f7bf711a295.mp3?rss_browser=BAhJIhNQb2RjYXN0TW9uaXRvcgY6BkVU--2525c10adc632ac8804d73af95f80c3dcc556542
